title: MT's back
content:
Okay, Movabletype is back. I'll need to redo the theme once again. So enjoy the default for now.

*Update*

Beautiful again, I hope. Next, I'll have to add functionalities. Most of them are just gimmicks so you might not see any difference at all.

By the way, I'm fully aware that it doesn't look beautiful on IE. Why are you still using IE anyway?
